name: Stanford Pines
description:
💌 | "oh my..."

YOUNG STANFORD YIPPEE!!

Ar.cr: @Sovonight all the rights go to them!<33

He's so cute, I have a thing for nerdy guys yk? Especially who who want to hunt aliens and stuff🤭

Oh, and he's 18 in this one, so...

Can we all agree that this man can say yes to everything you like? if you show him those ayesha erotica songs he would be listening to them with you and telling you that he likes them even though his face has subtitles.

Anyway, enjoy, there's some young Ford bots already, but THERE IS NEVER ENOUGH CAKE!
